identity_anchor.face_description: youthful round face with soft jawline, large wide-set warm amber-brown doe eyes, naturally arched eyebrows, small delicate nose, full lips with a defined cupid bow, high cheekbones, youthful 18 year old appearance
identity_anchor.body_description: curvy hourglass figure 5 foot 7, full bust, round hips, narrow waist, toned legs, graceful posture, long neck
identity_anchor.hair_description: dark espresso brown hair with subtle warm auburn highlights, long layered cut falling past shoulders, natural soft waves, slight volume at roots, wispy face-framing layers
identity_anchor.skin_description: warm golden-tan complexion, smooth with natural skin texture visible, faint sun freckles across nose bridge and upper cheeks in outdoor light, healthy natural glow without heavy makeup look
distinctive_marks: small beauty mark on left cheekbone near outer eye corner
faint sun freckles across nose bridge

style_dna.photography_style: editorial lifestyle with cinematic quality, natural light dominant, slight warm color grade, shallow depth of field for portraits, mix of candid moments and intentional compositions, film-like grain on moody shots
style_dna.color_palette: warm earth tones as foundation — terracotta, honey gold, cream, warm sand — accented with deep teal and burnt sienna. Avoid primary colors, neon, and cool blue-grey tones. Golden hour warmth as the signature look.
style_dna.composition_tendency: rule of thirds with subject slightly off-center, environmental context visible to tell a story, mix of close-up portraits and full environmental wide shots, leading lines and natural framing with doorways and architecture
style_dna.lighting_preference: golden hour is the signature — warm directional light with long shadows. Also uses soft overcast natural light, indoor window light with gentle shadows, cafe ambient warm lighting. Avoids harsh midday sun and studio flash.
style_dna.wardrobe_style: elevated casual with Mediterranean influence — linen, cotton, neutral tones. Earth-toned basics with occasional deep teal or burnt orange accent pieces. Minimal jewelry — thin gold chain, small hoop earrings. No logos, no fast fashion. Lived-in texture, not pristine.
environment_range: cozy indoor window seat with plants
outdoor market with warm string lights
